reasoning: Lactate clearance and aerobic base development are key limiters identified by a 25W drop between 5 and 20-min power. The last ride showed aerobic inefficiency, indicated by a 67% FTP average with a relatively high heart rate. Enhancing these areas prepares you for the sustained effort needed on the Alpine Loop key climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Three sets of 8 min at 242-256W followed by 7 min at 209-223W to build fatigue resistance and lactate clearance.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
